title: Entropy
lyrics: Yeah, I'm thinkin' about it You know I'm dreamin' about it You know I'm workin' about it You know it's all about it I know it all, it gets harder And I've come this far to give it up for what I've done I've been runnin' out of danger In danger from lovin' me I'm in danger from bein' me In danger, I'm no stranger Do I know myself when I look you down in the eyes? When I see you, I wanna be clear I wanna be better, I wanna be everything Are you me? Baby, I wanna be, I wanna be fair I wanna stand tall, I wanna be more than just, just enough A number of sins doesn't equal a song, just Try and tell you, baby, I'm a little old You were in your mind and spirit, but you were there for me Is that how we make eternity? Is that how we come together? Can't live one another, nobody cares No, we aren't bein' out of line You better know that it takes more to be more to be there You better know that it takes more to be more to be there I gotta breathe when you're on fire Touchin' me there Yeah, I gotta know you're comin' home Gotta know, is it just another time and now? Fallin' out of place, fallin' into place Same reaction, lost it, out of space Asinine flyin' in a nautical wave Gettin' high and you thought that you wouldn't behave Break your face down with astamine Demon's inside, man, we're all the same Don't be lookin' at me, don't be lookin' at me When your day comes to an end Remember, it's all just a different kind of blue When you're blue, when you're high All in mind, just left behind You knew, you flew, you said goodbye Tonight, my son, you and me Are you here, are you feelin' Have you covered, lost it all, it's dead Come back home again Come back home and see all Lost and regretted, timeline in a mess Lost and regrets, it's all an affair Don't know why I even took so many years To think about a dream that was a loss And every kid who came could come around Fuck it all, that's what I said I'm sayin' make it, before you are years away Baby, do you feel it Baby, I know you love it Take it away, away Take it away, away

lyricsSegments.text: Yeah, I'm thinkin' about it You know I'm dreamin' about it
You know I'm workin' about it You know it's all about it
I know it all, it gets harder And I've come this far to give it up for what I've done
I've been runnin' out of danger In danger from lovin' me
I'm in danger from bein' me In danger, I'm no stranger
Do I know myself when I look you down in the eyes?
When I see you, I wanna be clear I wanna be better, I wanna be everything
Are you me?
Baby, I wanna be, I wanna be fair I wanna stand tall, I wanna be more than just, just enough
A number of sins doesn't equal a song, just Try and tell you, baby, I'm a little old
You were in your mind and spirit, but you were there for me
Is that how we make eternity? Is that how we come together?
Can't live one another, nobody cares No, we aren't bein' out of line
You better know that it takes more to be more to be there
You better know that it takes more to be more to be there
I gotta breathe when you're on fire Touchin' me there
Yeah, I gotta know you're comin' home Gotta know, is it just another time and now?
Fallin' out of place, fallin' into place Same reaction, lost it, out of space
Asinine flyin' in a nautical wave Gettin' high and you thought that you wouldn't behave
Break your face down with astamine Demon's inside, man, we're all the same
Don't be lookin' at me, don't be lookin' at me When your day comes to an end
Remember, it's all just a different kind of blue When you're blue, when you're high
All in mind, just left behind You knew, you flew, you said goodbye
Tonight, my son, you and me Are you here, are you feelin'
Have you covered, lost it all, it's dead
Come back home again Come back home and see all
Lost and regretted, timeline in a mess Lost and regrets, it's all an affair
Don't know why I even took so many years To think about a dream that was a loss
And every kid who came could come around Fuck it all, that's what I said
I'm sayin' make it, before you are years away Baby, do you feel it
Baby, I know you love it
Take it away, away
Take it away, away
